description:
## Goal

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

- [ ] Tests/validation complete

notes: Completed git/code analysis of extraction prompt history. Identified four main phases: single-pass generic extractor (3435ebd), user override and dormant domain-specific prompt variants (429a259, 1bb5d7e), ontology-aware batch extraction via OntologyPromptBridge (9d656c1), and runtime three-pass semantic ingest with governed prompt-context precedence (cf3b326, 262dcac, 880b1b9, 4b580f7, 4c6309f). Obsidian note written to 2026-04-12-extraction-prompt-history-analysis.md.

title: bug: DNS resolve failure in SDK indexing pipeline (neo4j:7687)
description:
## Problem
Seocho.add() fails with 'Failed to DNS resolve address neo4j:7687' on all write operations.

Direct Neo4jGraphStore.write() works fine. Direct neo4j driver session works fine.
The issue is specifically in the SDK pipeline path: Seocho.add() → _LocalEngine.add() → IndexingPipeline.index() → GraphStore.write().

## Evidence
- store.write([...], database='neo4j') → SUCCESS
- store.query('MATCH ...', database='finderlpg') → SUCCESS (17060 nodes)
- s.add('text', database='neo4j') → FAIL: DNS resolve neo4j:7687
- s.add('text', database='finderlpg') → FAIL: DNS resolve neo4j:7687

## Hypothesis
IndexingPipeline may be creating a separate Neo4jGraphStore instance or the pipeline is passing different connection parameters to the driver.

## Impact
All E2E indexing fails. No data can be written through the SDK.

## Requested
Full code path trace from Seocho.add() to the actual Neo4j session.run() call. Find where 'neo4j:7687' hostname appears instead of 'localhost:7687'.
close_reason: Root cause: .env had NEO4J_URI=bolt://neo4j:7687 (Docker hostname). Fixed to bolt://localhost:7687. E2E now runs successfully (10/10 indexing, queries working).

title: feat: ontology-first SDK refactor
description:
## Goal
Reshape seocho/ SDK package with Ontology as the first-class primitive that drives both graph construction (extraction/indexing) and querying via system/dynamic prompts.

## Key deliverables
- seocho/ontology.py — Ontology, NodeDef, RelDef, P builder API
- seocho/prompt_strategy.py — ExtractionStrategy, QueryStrategy, LinkingStrategy
- seocho/graph_store.py — GraphStore abstraction over Neo4j/DozerDB
- seocho/llm_backend.py — Pluggable LLM backend
- Updated seocho/client.py — local engine mode + ontology param
- Updated exports and backward compat

## Collaboration Context
- Severity: high
- Impact: high
- Urgency: this_sprint
- Sprint: 2026-S03
- Roadmap: platform-workflow
- Area: backend
close_reason: Ontology-first SDK with JSON-LD storage, SHACL validation, and denormalization support pushed to main (5940068)

title: feat: multi-agent extraction (parallel, debate, ensemble)
description:
## Why
sequential extraction만 지원. parallel/debate/ensemble로 품질 향상 가능.

## Todo
- [ ] ParallelExtractionStrategy: N개 모델 동시 추출 → 합집합
- [ ] DebateExtractionStrategy: N개 agent 추출 후 불일치 토론
- [ ] EnsembleExtractionStrategy: 과반수 투표 병합
- [ ] AgentConfig extraction_strategy=parallel|debate|ensemble
- [ ] FinDER 10건 각 전략별 score 비교

## Design
IndexingStrategy ABC 확장. AgentConfig에서 선택.
